overall.description: A cinematic drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning on an elevated neon-lit highway with massive corporate billboards, descending to wet ground-level streets, and navigating through narrow urban canyons with reflective wet pavement and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated corporate highway with massive digital billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising straight along elevated highway, passing towering neon billboards and corporate skyscrapers

entered.detail: massive red neon billboard with circular logo and text reading HYDRO SUBSIDIUM
tall dark glass skyscraper with illuminated windows
tall futuristic building with vertical lighting strips
metal and glass safety railing along the elevated road edge

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway through a futuristic corporate district at night. The massive red neon Hydro Subsidium billboard dominates the left side while towering glass skyscrapers flank both sides of the road. The pavement is dry and the street is nearly empty, with only light trails from distant vehicles visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway transition ramp descending to street level

events.description: taking right curve and beginning descent from elevated highway to ground level
transitioning from elevated highway to ground level street with palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: navigating right curve on elevated ramp, descending toward street level while passing palm trees

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the descending ramp
open plaza area visible at the bottom of the descent with reflective wet surfaces

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes a sweeping right curve on the elevated highway, descending toward ground level. The Hydro Subsidium billboard passes out of view behind the vehicle while palm trees come into view on the left. The road transitions from dry elevated highway to wet ground-level streets with the CH corporate tower visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet downtown city street with neon storefronts

events.description: taking left curve through wet city streets with neon reflections on pavement

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets, taking left curve with neon lights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement

entered.detail: building facades with bright neon signage and illuminated windows
yellow and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the road
tall street lamps with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: Now at ground level, the vehicle navigates a left curve through wet downtown streets. Neon signs from storefronts reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt. Yellow construction barriers line the left side of the road while the CH corporate tower looms closer ahead. The environment feels more enclosed as the buildings press closer to the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with overhead street lighting

events.description: passing under bright overhead street lights in narrow street canyon

agents.ego_description: driving straight through narrow street canyon, passing under sequential overhead street lights

entered.detail: bright horizontal LED street light spanning across the road
tall building wall with illuminated windows close to the street
tall building facade with digital billboards on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow urban canyon with buildings pressing close on both sides. Bright overhead street lights illuminate the wet road surface as the camera passes underneath them. The CH corporate tower is now directly ahead, and the environment feels more enclosed and intimate compared to the wide elevated highway at the start.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a wide, elevated corporate highway into the claustrophobic, rain-slicked canyons of a neon-lit downtown. It begins on a dry elevated road flanked by towering glass skyscrapers, dominated by a massive red neon Hydro Subsidium billboard. As the vehicle takes a sweeping right curve, the billboard recedes and the road descends toward ground level, transitioning from dry pavement to wet streets as palm trees appear and the CH corporate tower emerges on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a left curve through the downtown district, where neon storefront signs begin to reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt and yellow construction barriers line the route. Finally, the camera enters a narrow urban canyon where the buildings press close on both sides and bright overhead street lights illuminate the wet road, bringing the vehicle directly beneath the looming presence of the CH corporate tower.
